name: list_projects
description: Lists all Sanity projects associated with your account

intent.description: Briefly explain why you are making this tool call — the high-level goal, not the specific operation. For example: "migrating content from legacy CMS", "building a product catalog for launch", "cleaning up orphaned references after schema change".
